summary: Built a SaaS crypto trading platform, developed embedded HID firmware and a Windows input driver, and iterated on AI/ML research projects including crypto prediction and computer vision for online poker.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Continued work on the AI-driven crypto trading platform, touching build infrastructure, authentication, and deployment tooling.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware development
items.description: Iterated on feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation firmware for the ESP32-S3, adding a new matrix variant and event emitting.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Developed a KMDF input filter and injection driver, adding push-style event delivery and integration tests.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Worked heavily on the trading platform, shipping features for outbound proxies, strategy templates, billing model changes, UI overhauls, and security hardening.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Built out features including an MCP server agent interface, LLM client integrations, and a WebSocket notification system for the trading platform.

items.title: On-device LLM assistant for Android
items.description: Iterated on an Android LLM assistant, restructuring the sub-agent architecture, adding new offline models, and implementing wake-word processing.

items.title: E-ink note-taking launcher
items.description: Built an Android launcher centered around note-taking for E-ink devices.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Continued development of the crypto trading platform.

items.title: Neovim IDE configuration
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim development environment setup.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware development
items.description: Iterated on multiple firmware versions for the ESP32-S3, introducing BLE and USB touch support and performance profiles.

items.title: AI coding assistant tooling
items.description: Worked on an autonomous multi-session AI coding tool, adding Git rules, task IDs, and squash-merge features.

items.title: Trading bot infrastructure
items.description: Built and iterated on a Telegram-based multi-bot frontend for Freqtrade trading bots.

items.title: Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Iterated on a Windows Explorer file and folder tagging utility, focusing on Microsoft Store publishing and CI pipelines.
